The Beekeeper (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $66,220,535Details
International Box Office $86,188,698
Worldwide Box Office $152,409,233
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,730,319
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,110,899
Total $5,841,218
Further financial details...

Synopsis

One man’s brutal campaign for vengeance takes on national stakes after he is revealed to be a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organization known as “Beekeepers”.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,576,007 (25.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.99 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,303 opening theaters/3,337 max. theaters, 7.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $70,026,314

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 12th, 2024 (Wide) by Amazon MGM Studios
January 12th, 2024 (IMAX) by Amazon MGM Studios
International Releases: January 10th, 2024 (Wide), released as Beekeeper: Sentencia de Muerte (Mexico)
January 10th, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
January 10th, 2024 (Wide) (Philippines)
January 11th, 2024 (Wide) (New Zealand)
January 11th, 2024 (Wide) (Croatia)
Video Release: January 30th, 2024 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: R for strong violence throughout, pervasive language, some sexual references and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2798 (cert #54099), 8/30/2023)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Filming location (country): England, United Kingdom
Geographical setting: Massachusetts
Plot point: Revenge
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Miramax Films, Cedar Park Entertainment, Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Amazon Studios, Punch Palace Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
